text: Surrounded by glass walls, bright lights, and the suggestion of innovation, I feel a sense of anticipation as I approach this R+D (Research and Development) space. It’s a modern environment that urges me to reflect on the creations of humanity and the possibilities ahead. The atmosphere feels both clinical and creative—a curious tension that heightens my awareness of purpose and potential. I sense the edge of inspiration in this constructed order, inviting me to contribute or to simply observe in thoughtful silence.
